title: Delete Task
description: Permanently delete a specific task from a squid

content.introduction: This endpoint permanently deletes a specific task using its hash ID. The task and its associated data will be removed from the system.

parameters.name: task_hash
parameters.description: The unique identifier (hash) of the task to delete

proTips.content: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Task data and results will be lost.
Use Get Task first to verify you're deleting the correct task.
Deleting a task does not affect results that have already been exported or delivered.
To remove all tasks from a squid, use the Empty Squid endpoint instead of deleting tasks one by one.

seo.title: Delete Task - lobstr.io API Documentation
seo.description: Learn how to permanently delete a task from a squid using the lobstr.io API.
